---
title: "Kernels"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.container}
# Kernels

DPmixGPD supports multiple bulk kernels and tail configurations. This page is the catalog entry point: what kernels exist, how they are organized, and where to find details.

[Articles index (pkgdown)](pkgdown/articles/index.html){.btn .btn-primary}
[Kernel support table](pkgdown/reference/kernel_support_table.html){.btn .btn-outline-light}
:::
:::

::: {.section}
::: {.container}

::: {.grid-3}

::: {.cardx}
### Bulk kernels
The bulk model is intended to flexibly represent the "typical" range of the outcome distribution (skewness, multimodality, heterogeneity). Kernel choice mainly affects interpretability and computational behavior.
:::

::: {.cardx}
### Tail modeling (GPD)
Tail modeling targets rare, high-impact outcomes beyond a threshold. The threshold strategy and tail parameterization determine extrapolation behavior and uncertainty.
:::

::: {.cardx}
### Registry and introspection
Programmatic access to what is supported (useful for automated workflows and checks).
- [get_kernel_registry](pkgdown/reference/get_kernel_registry.html)
- [get_tail_registry](pkgdown/reference/get_tail_registry.html)
:::

:::

:::
:::
